conditions: The Snake Charmer's Flute is a pre-Hardmode tool that places a pot from which a snake rises. Once the snake reaches its full height of 100 tiles or touches a block , it stops rising and becomes climbable like a rope . Blocks can also be placed next to the snake once it has fully extended. The snake and the pot disappear after approximately 25 seconds, and it also produces a small amount of light. The Snake Charmer's Flute can be found in Sandstone Chests in the top 4/7ths of the Underground Desert and in Oasis Crates and Mirage Crates obtained from fishing in the Oasis .

notes: Normal mode row
quantityText: Nail Gun (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) + Nail (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) (100–200)

notes: Nanites are a Hardmode crafting material used solely for crafting the Flask of Nanites and Nano Bullets , whose purpose is to inflict the Confused debuff with melee and ranged weapons , respectively. Nanites are purchased from the Cyborg for 15 SC each.

conditions: Neon Tetras are a type of fish which are found commonly by fishing in the Jungle in any layer. They sell for twice what other fish in their catch quality do, and on the Old-gen console version and Nintendo 3DS version they have no use except for this sell price.

notes: Normal mode row

conditions: The Key of Night is a craftable item that spawns a Corrupt Mimic or a Crimson Mimic when placed in any slot of any empty Chest , depending on whether the world generated with The Corruption or The Crimson , respectively. The world must be in Hardmode and the only item inside the Chest must be a single Key of Night.

notes: The Night Vision Helmet is an armor piece for the helmet slot. For the player wearing it, it increases the apparent light level provided by all light sources on the screen, similarly to the Night Owl buff . The Night Vision Helmet has a 1/30 (3.33%) chance to be dropped by Granite Elementals and Granite Golems . It can also be purchased from the Cyborg for 5 GC , after the Martian Madness event has been completed in the current world.
Normal mode row

conditions: The Oasis is a naturally spawning mini-biome that can be found on the Surface layer of the Desert biome. It consists of a sizable body of water surrounded by multiple palm trees and shrubbery such as mini cacti, ferns, and flowers. Cattail plants grow in the lake and there are often multiple Dragonflies flying around and above the surface of the water.

The Oasis Crate is a pre-Hardmode crate that can only be fished in the Desert biome . Oasis Crates contain items found in standard crates, and always contain one item normally found in a Sandstone Chest in the Underground Desert . Its Hardmode counterpart is the Mirage Crate .

The Mirage Crate is a Hardmode crate that can only be fished in the Desert biome . Mirage Crates contain items found in standard crates, and always contain one item normally found in a Sandstone Chest in the Underground Desert . Its pre-Hardmode counterpart is the Oasis Crate .

chanceText: (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 5% / (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 2%

conditions: The Orange Bloodroot is a type of plant . It can grow below Dirt Blocks in the Underground and Cavern layers. [ 1 ] Unlike many plants, instead of broken by any attack, it has to be harvested with a pickaxe . Its sole purpose is to make Orange Dye .

The Owl is a critter that spawns near Towns on the surface Forest and Hallow during the night , when it is not raining . It also has a small chance of spawning upon shaking a Forest tree at night. The Owl has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.

notes: Pad Thai is a food item that grants the Plenty Satisfied buff when consumed. This lasts for 8 minutes, but can be canceled at any time by right-clicking the icon ( ) , by selecting the icon using Cycle Next/Previous Buff and then pressing Remove Buff ( ) , or by double-tapping the buff icon ( ) . Pad Thai can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 55 SC .
The Paintbrush is a tool which is used to apply paint to tiles. It is purchased from the Painter for 1 GC . Its upgrade, the Spectre Paintbrush , grants a bonus to range.

conditions: The mechanics for the layers in this world are reversed, meaning that the player will encounter Cavern layer content in the Underground layer (e.g. Cavern quest fish can be caught in the underground layer; NPCs usually encountered in the Cavern layer can instead be found in the Underground layer; the Jungle Temple appears in the Surface layer).

notes: The Paint Roller is a tool which is used to paint walls . It is purchased from the Painter for 1 GC . Its upgrade, the Spectre Paint Roller , grants a bonus to range. Using a roller requires paint to be in the player's inventory .

The Paint Sprayer is a construction accessory that can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 10 GC . While equipped, or (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) when held in the inventory , it automatically applies paint or coating to any object when placing it. Like the Paintbrush and the Paint Roller , it will use the paint that is first in order in the inventory.
Normal mode row
Normal mode row

conditions: Palm Wood is a type of wood harvested from Palm trees found naturally growing in the Ocean biome and Oasis biome. Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of regular Sand Blocks above surface .

Palm Wood is a type of wood harvested from Palm trees found naturally growing in the Ocean biome and Oasis biome. Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of regular Sand Blocks above surface .

The Huge Dragon Egg is a consumable grab bag item, which can be opened with ⚷ Open / Activate from within the player's inventory and contains either a Chillet or Chillet Ignis . It is rarely found placed in the Cavern layer.

Digtoise is rarely found as "Sleeping Digtoise", a solid object in the Underground Desert . The Sleeping Digtoise has a 1/30 (3.33%) chance to replace Antlion Eggs during world generation, [ 2 ] and has a 1/100 (1%) chance to replace Antlion Eggs when they regrow. [ 3 ]

notes: Panda Ears are a vanity item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC .

conditions: The Panic Necklace is an accessory , that, when equipped, grants the player the Panic! buff for 8 seconds when harmed by any source of damage besides fire blocks, increasing movement speed by 100%. The Panic Necklace has a 1/5 (20%) chance of being obtained from destroying Crimson Hearts found in the Crimson or a 1/5 (20%) chance from Crimson Crates and Hematic Crates , which are fished in the Crimson. It can furthermore be crafted.

notes: The Parrot Cracker is a Hardmode pet-summoning item that spawns a Pet Parrot that follows the player. If the player stays still for long enough, it will perch on a nearby solid block, staying still until the player moves away from it. The Parrot Cracker can be purchased from the Pirate for 3 PC 75 GC if he is spoken to in an Ocean biome.
The Balloon Animal is a vanity accessory purchased from the Clothier for 2 GC while a Party is active. When worn, the Balloon Animal will be shown being held by the player, bobbing up and down.
Bundled Party Balloons are a vanity accessory purchased from the Clothier for 2 GC while a Party is active. When worn, the balloons will be shown being held by the player, bobbing up and down.

The Happy Grenade is an explosive consumable ranged weapon that inflicts half the damage of an ordinary Grenade and displays a confetti effect. They must be acquired initially from being dropped by the Party Girl when she is killed, although she only has 1/4 (25%) chance of dropping them each time she is killed. Once the Party Girl respawns again, they can be purchased from her for 2 SC 50 CC each, while the player has them in their inventory .
The Party Present is a decorative furniture item that can be purchased from the Party Girl during a Party for 20 SC . It has one of several different appearances when placed, similar to Books .
sourceRefName: Party Girl during a Party for

conditions: The Pearlstone Block is a Hardmode block type found in The Hallow . It requires at least a Nightmare Pickaxe , Deathbringer Pickaxe , or explosives to mine.

The Pearlstone Wall is a type of background wall which can be found in Corruption / Crimson chasms that have been taken over by the Hallow , considered unsafe . It does not drop as an item when destroyed, and can only be obtained on Desktop , Console , and Mobile , via crafting. It is considered a safe wall when placed by the player.

Pearlwood is a Hardmode -exclusive [ a ] type of wood harvested from Pearlwood trees and Pearlwood Palm trees found naturally growing in Hallow biomes. Pearlwood trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Hallowed grass or Mowed Hallowed grass above surface , and Pearlwood Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Pearlsand Blocks above surface.

Pearlwood is a Hardmode -exclusive [ a ] type of wood harvested from Pearlwood trees and Pearlwood Palm trees found naturally growing in Hallow biomes. Pearlwood trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Hallowed grass or Mowed Hallowed grass above surface , and Pearlwood Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Pearlsand Blocks above surface.

The Penguin is a harmless critter that only spawns in the Snow biome and may spawn with different colors. The Penguin has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.
